name: clprompter
displayName: Bob Cozzi's CL Prompter and Formatter for IBM i
description: IBM i CL Prompting and Formatting: Built for modern development

keybindings.when: editorTextFocus && (editorLangId == clle || editorLangId == clp || editorLangId == cl || editorLangId == bnd || editorLangId == cmd)

clPrompter.kwdColor.description: PARM keyword color in prompter.  Use CSS color values like ##1a237e, blue, or rgb(34,170,34).

clPrompter.kwdValueColor.description: PARM value color in prompter.  Use CSS color values like ##1a237e, blue, or rgb(34,170,34).

clPrompter.kwdColorAutoAdjust.description: PARM keyword color Auto-adjust for best contrast in dark/light/high-contrast themes. If false, uses your color exactly as specified.

clPrompter.saveCmdXMLtoFile.description: Write prompted command XML to the cmdDefn.xml file. Useful for troubleshooting but not recommended for normal use.

clPrompter.savedCmdXMLFileLocation.description: Directory where cmdDefn.xml file is written. Use ${tmpdir} for system temp, ${userHome} for home directory, or an absolute path.

clPrompter.savePrompterHTMLtoFile.description: Save prompter HTML to clPrompt-<cmdName>.html file for diagnostic purposes. This file can be sent to support for troubleshooting issues with the prompter.

clPrompter.savedPrompterHTMLFileLocation.description: Directory where clPrompt-<cmdName>.html file is written. Use ${tmpdir} for system temp, ${userHome} for home directory, or an absolute path.

clPrompter.convertParmValueToUpperCase.description: Convert CL variables, operators (*BCAT, *TCAT, etc.), and built-in functions (%SUBST, %TRIM, etc.) within PARM values to uppercase. When true, text like '&pickles *bcat %trim(x)' becomes '&PICKLES *BCAT %TRIM(x)'. When false, preserves original case. Applies when returning from the prompter.

clPrompter.convertCmdAndParmNameCase.description: Case conversion for CL command names and PARM keywords. *UPPER = uppercase (CHGVAR VAR(...)), *LOWER = lowercase (chgvar var(...)), *NONE = no change. Applies when returning from the prompter and when formatting CL source.

clPrompter.formatIndentComments.description: Indent comments. *YES = indent comments, *NO = leave at column 1.

clPrompter.formatLabelPosition.description: Position of the optional command label (1-10 characters followed by colon). Default: 2.

clPrompter.formatCmdPosition.description: Position where the CL command name starts. Must be at least 1 space after the label. Default: 14.

clPrompter.formatKwdPosition.description: Position where the first PARM/keyword starts. Use 0 for one space after command name. Default: 25.

clPrompter.formatContinuePosition.description: Position where continuation lines start. Normally 2 positions after formatKwdPosition. Default: 27.

clPrompter.formatRightMargin.description: Last position where data or continuation symbols (+ or -) may appear. Default: 72.

clPrompter.parmExpansionMax.description: Maximum number of characters a prompted input field can be expanded to by entering & and leaving the field. Default: 5000.

clPrompter.parmExpansionSize.description: Number of characters added to a prompted input field each time the user enters & and leaves the field. Default: 16.

clPrompter.prefetchCommands.default: PGM, DCL, MONMSG, CPYF, CHGVAR, SNDPGMMSG
clPrompter.prefetchCommands.description: Comma- or space-delimited list of CL command names to pre-load when a connection to IBM i is established. For each command, both the Prompter and helptext are prefetched. Leave blank to disable.

clPrompter.prefetchDelay.description: Seconds to wait after connecting to IBM i before starting pre-loading. Pre-loading does not block other IBM i activity (XML uses Mapepire silently; helptext uses PASE), so the default is 0. Increase only if you want to defer pre-loading to a specific time after connecting.

clPrompter.udtfSupportLibrary.description: Library on IBM i where clPrompter UDTFs such as CHECK_SYNTAX and CMD_HELP are installed. *TEMPLIB = use Code for IBM i's configured temporary library. Recommended SQLTOOLS or SYSTOOLS. Or enter any user library name. Default: *TEMPLIB.

enumDescriptions: Fast SQL-based helptext via the CMD_HELP UDTF (once installed on IBM i). Requires the CMD_HELP UDTF in the library specified by clPrompter.helpLibrary.
Legacy Helptext generated via the GENCMDDOC CL command. (slow).
clPrompter.parmHelpText.description: Interface to use to retrieve CL command parameter helptext when the ? button is clicked in the prompter.

editor/context.when: editorLangId == clle || editorLangId == clp || editorLangId == cmd || editorLangId == cl || editorLangId == bnd || editorLangId == cmd
editorTextFocus && (editorLangId == clle || editorLangId == clp || editorLangId == cl || editorLangId == bnd || editorLangId == cmd)
editorTextFocus && (editorLangId == clle || editorLangId == clp || editorLangId == cl || editorLangId == bnd || editorLangId == cmd)

scripts.build: npm run compile && npm run compile-webview && npm run copy-assets
scripts.test:api: tsc src/testAPICall.ts --outDir out --module commonjs --target es2020 --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck && node out/testAPICall.js
